suggestedEdits.report: Liquid biopsy, analyzing circulating tumor-derived components, including ctDNA, circulating tumor cells, microRNAs, and exosomes, has emerged as a key tool in precision oncology. This review synthesizes evidence from the past five years, covering biological mechanisms and clinical implications.
